sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40548" key="e)piploenterokh/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπλοεντεροκήλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hernia of omentum and intestines</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
